summary: All 8 missing_verification discrepancies resolved: planned checks were run with -v verbosity or as superset runs; skipped_planned_verification exceptions documented for each with matching IDs.

contract_exceptions.reason: The identical test set was run with -v flag (observed: 'python -m pytest tests/test_lang_detect.py tests/test_miner.py::test_mine_k8s_roundtrip tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_k8s_three_docs_produces_three_chunks tests/test_language_catalog.py tests/test_searcher.py::TestKubernetesLanguageSupport -v') and as a superset with -q (observed run also includes TestHelmLanguageSupport and test_symbol_extract.py). The -q/-v difference is output verbosity only; test coverage and pass/fail outcomes are identical.

test_mine_helm_chart_roundtrip was run with -v flag (observed: 'python -m pytest tests/test_miner.py::test_mine_helm_chart_roundtrip -v') and as part of a superset -q run with test_chunk_helm_values_top_level_paths and test_chunk_helm_template_tolerates_go_template_delimiters. Test coverage is equivalent; only output verbosity differs.

test_chunk_helm_values_top_level_paths was included in two superset runs: (1) 'python -m pytest tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_chart_produces_helm_chart_symbol tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_values_top_level_paths tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_template_tolerates_go_template_delimiters -v' and (2) 'python -m pytest tests/test_miner.py::test_mine_helm_chart_roundtrip tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_values_top_level_paths tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_template_tolerates_go_template_delimiters -q'. The planned isolated -q run was superseded by these equivalent-coverage runs.

test_chunk_helm_template_tolerates_go_template_delimiters was included in two superset runs: (1) 'python -m pytest tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_chart_produces_helm_chart_symbol tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_values_top_level_paths tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_template_tolerates_go_template_delimiters -v' and (2) 'python -m pytest tests/test_miner.py::test_mine_helm_chart_roundtrip tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_values_top_level_paths tests/test_miner.py::test_chunk_helm_template_tolerates_go_template_delimiters -q'. Test coverage is equivalent.

Both target tests (test_non_chart_values_yaml_remains_yaml and test_non_chart_kubernetes_yaml_still_detects_kubernetes) were included in: (1) a superset -v run with three additional chart detection tests, and (2) a superset -q run with TestHelmLanguageSupport and symbol extract tests. The planned isolated -q run was superseded by these superset runs covering identical test targets.

TestHelmLanguageSupport was run with -v flag (observed: 'python -m pytest tests/test_searcher.py::TestHelmLanguageSupport -v') and as part of a superset -q run. The -q/-v difference is output verbosity only; test class coverage is identical.

All three symbol extract tests (test_extract_helm_chart_symbol, test_extract_helm_template_visible_name, test_extract_helm_template_templated_name_falls_back_to_kind) were run with -v flag (observed: same three tests with -v) and as part of a superset -q run. The -q/-v difference is output verbosity only; test coverage is identical.

Both test_catalog_preserves_current_detection_labels and test_catalog_keeps_non_extension_boundaries_explicit are covered by the full test suite run (observed: 'python -m pytest tests/ -x -q'), which is a superset of any per-module or per-function run targeting tests/test_language_catalog.py. No isolated -q run of these specific methods was needed given the full suite passed.
